description: Prove that mirroring a binary tree twice yields the original tree.
preamble:
def mirror {α : Type} : Tree α → Tree α
  | Tree.nil => Tree.nil
  | Tree.node a l r => Tree.node a (mirror r) (mirror l)
statement:
theorem mirror_mirror {α : Type} (t : Tree α) :
    mirror (mirror t) = t
notes: From logical_verification_2025/lean/LoVe/LoVe05_FunctionalProgramming_Demo.lean lines 440-445. Ground-truth proof: induction t with | nil => rfl | node a l r ih_l ih_r => simp [mirror, ih_l, ih_r]
